dataset_goal: Generate a dataset designed to train an LLM to act as a prompt architect. The dataset must map basic user queries into comprehensive, context-rich instructional prompts for secondary LLMs. The generated target prompts must strictly separate the user's core objective from the required execution methodology. Output prompts must include explicit instructions on data prioritization, evidence-based reasoning requirements, distinct categorization of outputs, and strict formatting rules, ensuring the downstream LLM performs deep, factual analysis rather than surface-level summarization.
